narrative:
category_one_description: [ENTITY_REDACTED] of New York Inc is seeking bids for Category 1 services for Dedicated Internet Access (DIA).Requested service is fiber-based internet with a speed range of 1 Gbps to 5 Gbps, scalable within this range as needed. Symmetrical bandwidth is preferred.Service must include all necessary components to deliver internet connectivity to the applicants site, including any required equipment.Vendors must include all applicable costs, clearly identify any ineligible components, include SPIN, and comply with all E-Rate program rules.
service_type: Data Transmission and/or Internet Access
service_category: Category 1
function: Internet Access and Data Transmission Service
minimum_capacity: 500.00 Mbps
maximum_capacity: 5120.00 Mbps
installation_initial: True
form_nickname: GREEK AMERICAN INSTITUTE of New York Inc FY 2026 C2&C1
